ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chatbots" (
  "bot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chatbot */,
  "bot_name" TEXT /* Name of the chatbot */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the chatbot */,
  "features" TEXT /* Key features of the chatbot */,
  "programming_languages" TEXT /* Programming languages and SDKs supported */,
  "supported_languages" TEXT /* Languages in which the chatbot can operate */,
  "clients_fields" TEXT /* Industries or fields where the chatbot is used */,
  "channels" TEXT /* Communication channels supported by the chatbot */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the chatbot */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the chatbot was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the chatbot (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "integration_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about integrations with other systems */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for secure identification */,
  "memory_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum memory capacity of the chatbot */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Data used for training the chatbot's natural language processing capabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or organization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry or field of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the client account was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the client */,
  "plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the client */,
  "billing_info" TEXT /* Billing information for the client */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the client account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the client last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bot_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "bot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chatbot being deployed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client to whom the chatbot is deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the chatbot was deployed */,
  "deployment_channel" TEXT /* Communication channel used for deployment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "deployment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the deployment */,
  "support_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for support */,
  "customization_options" TEXT /* Customization options applied to the chatbot */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Deployment metrics (e.g., performance, user feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bot_deployments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bot_deployments_bot_id FOREIGN KEY ("bot_id") REFERENCES chatbots ("bot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bot_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployment being used */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the chatbot was accessed */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., voice, text, email) */,
  "interaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of interactions on the given date */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the chatbot */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of each interaction in seconds */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Average response time of the chatbot */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the interaction */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., IP address, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bot_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bot_usage_deployment_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_id") REFERENCES bot_deployments ("deployment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, customer) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date the user last performed an activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
